nasb.text: But when Paul appealed to be held in custody for the Emperor’s decision, I ordered him to be kept in custody until I send him to Caesar.”

esv.text: But when Paul had appealed to be kept in custody for the decision of the emperor, I ordered him to be held until I could send him to Caesar.”

cnv.text: 但保羅要求把他留下，等待皇上裁判，我就下令把他押起來，等候解往凱撒那裡。”

ccb.text: 但保罗请求留下来，听皇帝定夺，所以我下令仍然扣留他，等着送交凯撒。”

csbs.text: 可是保罗请求把他留给皇帝审断，我就下令把他留下，等着我送他到凯撒那里去。”
